description_long: This is a knitted beanie hat with a ribbed texture covering the entire surface, including the folded cuff. The hat is predominantly a single color, with a subtle, slightly raised pattern or logo embroidered on the front of the cuff. The crown of the hat is smoothly rounded, and the cuff is thick and neatly rolled, providing extra warmth and structure. The material appears to be a soft, flexible knit, likely made from wool or acrylic fibers. The overall design is minimalist, with the only decorative element being the front embroidery.
description: A ribbed knit beanie with a folded cuff and subtle front embroidery, made from soft, flexible material. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed knit texture, rounded crown, and a visible embroidered logo on the cuff.
description_view_1: Angled top-side view highlighting the smooth, rounded crown and the continuous ribbed pattern.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the symmetrical, domed crown and the even distribution of the ribbed texture.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back of the beanie and the rolled cuff without visible decoration.
